blockers: The complete direct and transitive Linux x86_64 / CPython 3.13 publisher artifact set is not held in the active environment.
Publisher artifacts cannot be substituted with locally reconstructed wheels without explicit exception approval.
A uv.lock must not be fabricated without a reproducible resolution and successful offline sync.
release_requirement: Acquire every pinned direct and transitive publisher artifact, generate uv.lock with uv 0.11.29, and pass the required frozen offline sync.
